hypotheses.name: Cell-type marker separation — expanded panel + contamination control
hypotheses.method: Expanded cell-type marker panel (4 types: T_cell/7, B_cell/5, fibroblast/3, epithelial/2 = 17 genes). Within-type (N=35) vs cross-type (N=101) pairwise L2 distances on unit-sphere embeddings at each of 12 layers. Contamination control: random non-marker named gene subsets (same sizes) tested to confirm signal is marker-specific. Layer curve fit: linear regression on logit(AUROC) vs layer index.
hypotheses.primary_metric: AUROC (within vs cross cell-type distance) + specificity delta vs control
hypotheses.result_value: AUROC mean=0.851 (range [0.815,0.878]), control AUROC=0.488 (near chance), specificity delta=0.363, 12/12 layers sig MW, 12/12 layers control NOT sig. Layer curve slope=-0.036 (r=-0.765, p=0.004).
hypotheses.next_action: Cross-model validation in Geneformer word embeddings; test T-cell vs fibroblast distance asymmetry (AUROC<0.5 meaning cross-pairs are closer than random)

hypotheses.name: GO Biological Process proximity — 3rd independent biological anchor
hypotheses.method: Fetched GO BP annotations for 209 named genes via mygene API (batch queries). Computed GO BP Jaccard for 20,000 gene pairs. Spearman(GO_Jaccard, L2_distance) per layer. AUROC for high-Jaccard (>=0.032, N=4277) vs zero-Jaccard (N=11575) pairs at each of 12 layers.
hypotheses.primary_metric: Spearman rho (GO_Jaccard vs L2 distance) + AUROC high vs zero Jaccard
hypotheses.result_value: Spearman rho mean=-0.077 (range [-0.063,-0.090]), 12/12 sig layers (all p<1e-19); AUROC mean=0.557 (12/12 sig). Effect peaks at L7 (rho=-0.090) and L8 (rho=-0.088).
hypotheses.next_action: Compare GO BP vs GO MF vs GO CC; test pathway-level clustering; check if effect shape (peak at L7) matches STRING/TRRUST layer profiles

hypotheses.name: TRRUST Activation vs Repression proximity asymmetry
hypotheses.method: Split 141 TRRUST-exclusive pairs (not in STRING) by regulatory direction: Activation (N=47), Repression (N=26), Unknown (N=68). Tested each group vs non-STRING background (Mann-Whitney) at each of 12 layers. Two-sided MW for Activation vs Repression comparison.
hypotheses.primary_metric: AUROC (activation vs non-STRING) and (repression vs non-STRING); Act vs Rep effect
hypotheses.result_value: Activation AUROC=0.640 (12/12 sig, all p<0.002); Repression AUROC=0.459 (0/12 sig, all p>0.58); Act vs Rep effect=-0.151 (dist diff), 8/12 layers sig. Effect grows with depth (L0=-0.094 to L11=-0.215).
hypotheses.next_action: Validate with Dorothea dataset (dorothea_human.tsv, higher N); test in Geneformer embeddings; investigate TF hub centrality for activation TFs
